SHORT NAME: CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 

LONG NAME: CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: XXX.XX 

COMMENT: Applies only to inpatient (LTCH) claims. This field is new in October 2015. 

For a LTCH PPS 

claim, only one of four fields will be populated (CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_CST_AMT, 

CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT, CLM_FULL_STD_PYMT_AMT,
